case_title: FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. A CALIFORNIA CORP. VS LUIZ, LISA L.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. A CALIFORNIA CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT LUIZ, LISA L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUIZ, LISA L.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,558.13 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LUIZ, LISA L.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. A CALIFORNIA CORP. ASSIGNED TO MEZZETTI FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. A CALIFORNIA CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUIZ, LISA L. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. A CALIFORNIA CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUIZ, LISA L. $2,580.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,558.13 INTEREST, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,168.13

PLTFS.CONT.REQUEST WITH $10.00 CHECK RETURNED WITH INFO: DID NOT GIVE REASON, FAILED TO NOTIFY OTHER PARTY;
